title: Friend Requests II: Who Has the Most Friends
titleCn: 好友申请 II ：谁有最多的好友

testcases.input: RequestAccepted table: +--------------+-------------+-------------+ | requester_id | accepter_id | accept_date | +--------------+-------------+-------------+ | 1 | 2 | 2016/06/03 | | 1 | 3 | 2016/06/08 | | 2 | 3 | 2016/06/08 | | 3 | 4 | 2016/06/09 | +--------------+-------------+-------------+ Output: +----+-----+ | id | num | +----+-----+ | 3 | 3 | +----+-----+ Explanation: The person with id 3 is a friend of people 1, 2, and 4, so he has three friends in total, which is the most number than any others.
testcases.expectedOutput: +----+-----+ | id | num | +----+-----+ | 3 | 3 | +----+-----+ Explanation: The person with id 3 is a friend of people 1, 2, and 4, so he has three friends in total, which is the most number than any others.
